name: laravel-nextjs-mui-app
description: Fullstack application with Laravel backend and Next.js frontend using MUI

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && composer install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd backend && php artisan migrate && php artisan key:generate
scripts.test: cd backend && php artisan test && cd ../frontend && npm run test
scripts.clean: cd frontend && npm run clean && cd ../backend && php artisan config:clear && php artisan cache:clear

author: Your Name
